1040-es:quarter.label: Which quarter
1040-es:quarter.so: Tani waa rubucii sannadka ee lacagtan canshuurta ee qiyaasan loogu talagalay — dadka shaqada madax-bannaan ah ayaa inta badan bixiya canshuur afar jeer sannadkii.
1040-es:quarter.en: This is which quarter of the year this estimated tax payment is for — self-employed people often pay taxes four times a year instead of through paycheck withholding.

1040-es:paymentAmount.label: Payment amount
1040-es:paymentAmount.so: Tani waa qiimaha lacagta canshuurta qiyaasan ee aad u dirayso dawladda rubucan.
1040-es:paymentAmount.en: This is the amount of estimated tax you're sending to the government for this quarter.
